title: Wings of Prey
notes: It shows the startup menu for a split second then crashes. Probably due to third party DRM.

yuPlay Launcher seems broken, but starting the game from command line seems to be working fine. Another option is to rename launcher.exe to launcher.exe.bak and copy acess.exe to launcher.exe. This removes option to log into online account or set resolution (should launcher work anyway), but allows to use Steam Play button.
title: Wings of Prey

notes: After moving launcher.exe to launcher.exe.bak and then copying acess.exe to launcher.exe it works perfectly as far as i can tell.
